props_visible: Wooden dining table with brass/copper stud nail decoration (traditional furniture embellishment)
Mixed food spread: kabsa/rice dish, grilled items, salad, side dishes
Woven bread basket with small pastries/bread
Traditional mashrabiya lattice railing in background

text_overlays.content_summary: عاصيب — Aseeb calligraphic logo (white, top center)

notable_visual_elements: Kabsa/rice as centerpiece dish = Najdi traditional main course
Riyadh city lights in background = 'you are in the heart of Riyadh, dining on Najdi heritage'
Studded nail furniture decoration = traditional Saudi furniture craft motif
Gold dallah on food table = hospitality ritual object present even with savory meal
Night terrace with city view = premium outdoor dining experience

hospitality_cues: Kabsa (rice + meat) on the table = the definitive Najdi/Saudi celebratory meal
Dallah present on food table = hospitality apparatus always within reach
Studded furniture = traditional craft embedded in dining environment
cultural_notes.free_notes: Terrace dining at night with Riyadh skyline visible is a classic modern Saudi lifestyle visual — 'I dine al-fresco in the city I love.' The kabsa as the table centerpiece reanchors it in Najdi food tradition. The combination of traditional architecture + city lights + kabsa + dallah is the full 'Riyadh Najdi' visual vocabulary compressed into one frame. This is what the target audience aspires to.

pattern_matches.notes: Night terrace with city skyline — environment creates the aspirational dining context
Table spread from side angle — multiple dishes showing the full meal experience
